title: Solve coin change with all algorithms
description: Verify that entering valid coins and a target amount on the home flow produces results for greedy, dynamic programming, and backtracking with the expected solution details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with valid comma-separated coin values
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Select the greedy, dynamic programming, and backtracking algorithms
Submit the form
Verify results are displayed for all selected algorithms
Verify the results include the coins used, coin count, optimality, and execution time

title: Solve coins with all algorithms on the HTML results page
description: A user can submit valid coins and amount on the home page and see solved results for greedy, dynamic programming, and backtracking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with a valid comma-separated list
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Select the greedy algorithm
Select the dynamic programming algorithm
Select the backtracking algorithm
Submit the form
Verify results are displayed for each selected algorithm
Verify coins used, coin count, optimality, and execution time are shown

title: Solve coin change with greedy only and compare against optimal
description: Verify that requesting greedy alone still shows whether the greedy solution matched the optimal result after the system performs its silent verification.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with valid comma-separated coin values
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Select only the greedy algorithm
Submit the form
Verify a greedy result is displayed
Verify the greedy result indicates whether it matched the optimal solution

title: Solve coins with greedy only and verify optimality is shown
description: A user can request only the greedy algorithm and still see whether the greedy result matched the optimal solution.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with a valid comma-separated list
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Select the greedy algorithm
Submit the form
Verify the greedy result is displayed
Verify an optimality status is shown

title: Reject solve request without an algorithm selection
description: Verify that submitting the solve form without selecting any algorithm is blocked and the user sees a validation message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with valid comma-separated coin values
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Submit the form
Verify an algorithm selection validation error is visible
Verify no results are displayed

title: Reject invalid coin input on the HTML form
description: A user who enters invalid coin denominations can submit the form and see validation feedback instead of results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with invalid coin input
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Select the greedy algorithm
Submit the form
Verify a validation error is shown
Verify no solve results are displayed

title: Reject submission when no algorithm is selected
description: A user who submits valid coins and amount without choosing an algorithm sees a validation message and no results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with a valid comma-separated list
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Submit the form
Verify a validation error is shown
Verify no solve results are displayed

title: Reject invalid coin input on solve form
description: Verify that invalid coin denominations or malformed input on the solve form are rejected and no result set is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with invalid comma-separated values
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Select at least one algorithm
Submit the form
Verify a coin denomination validation error is visible
Verify no results are displayed

title: Solve coin change through the REST API with one algorithm
description: An API consumer can request a single algorithm through the JSON endpoint and receive a structured result.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/solve
Provide valid coin denominations, amount, and the greedy algorithm in the query parameters
Verify a JSON response is displayed
Verify the greedy result is included in the response

title: API returns dynamic programming solution
description: Verify that the REST solve endpoint returns a structured dynamic programming result when dp is requested.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/solve with valid coins, target amount, and the dynamic programming algorithm requested
Verify a structured JSON response is displayed
Verify the response includes the optimal coin combination and coin count for dynamic programming

title: Solve coin change through the REST API with multiple algorithms
description: An API consumer can request multiple algorithms through the JSON endpoint and receive a structured result for each one.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/solve
Provide valid coin denominations, amount, and multiple algorithms in the query parameters
Verify a JSON response is displayed
Verify results are included for each requested algorithm

title: Compare multiple algorithms on the same input
description: A user can run more than one algorithm for the same coins and amount and compare the returned results on one page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with a valid comma-separated list
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Select the greedy algorithm
Select the dynamic programming algorithm
Submit the form
Verify results are displayed for both selected algorithms
Verify the algorithms can be compared on the same page

title: Run performance analysis and view benchmark summary
description: Verify that submitting valid inputs on the analysis page generates benchmark charts and a summary table for the algorithms.

steps.description: Navigate to /analysis
Fill in the coin denominations field with valid comma-separated coin values
Fill in the maximum amount field with a valid amount
Submit the form
Verify benchmark charts are displayed
Verify a summary table is displayed

title: Review analysis summary metrics and charts
description: An analyst can submit an input on the analysis page and see benchmark summary metrics and charts for the algorithms.

steps.description: Navigate to /analysis
Enter a valid maximum amount
Submit the analysis request
Verify a summary table is displayed
Verify benchmark charts are displayed

title: Verify greedy results are checked against the optimal solution
description: When a user requests greedy only, the response still shows whether the greedy coin count matched the optimal solution.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/solve
Provide valid coin denominations, amount, and the greedy algorithm in the query parameters
Verify the greedy result is displayed
Verify an optimality status is shown for the greedy result

title: View comparison results for multiple algorithms
description: Verify that comparing multiple algorithms on the same input shows distinct outputs for each selected algorithm on the results page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with valid comma-separated coin values
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Select the greedy and dynamic programming algorithms
Submit the form
Verify results are displayed for both selected algorithms
Verify the comparison shows separate coin counts for each algorithm

title: API returns backtracking solution within limit
description: Verify that the REST solve endpoint returns a backtracking solution when the amount is within the supported limit.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/solve with valid coins, an amount of 60 or less, and the backtracking algorithm requested
Verify a structured JSON response is displayed
Verify the response includes the backtracking coins used and coin count

title: Review analysis output after running benchmarks with a different input
description: An analyst can run the analysis page with a new maximum amount and see updated benchmark results on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /analysis
Enter a valid maximum amount
Submit the analysis request
Enter a different valid maximum amount
Submit the analysis request
Verify updated analysis charts are displayed
Verify updated summary metrics are displayed

title: Reject invalid analysis input
description: Verify that invalid analysis parameters are rejected on the analysis page and benchmark output is not shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /analysis
Fill in the coin denominations field with invalid comma-separated values
Fill in the maximum amount field with a valid amount
Submit the form
Verify an analysis validation error is visible
Verify benchmark charts are not displayed

title: Block backtracking results above the supported amount
description: A user requesting backtracking for an amount above the supported limit sees an over-limit error while other requested algorithms still return results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with a valid comma-separated list
Fill in the target amount field with an amount above the backtracking limit
Select the dynamic programming algorithm
Select the backtracking algorithm
Submit the form
Verify a backtracking limit error is shown
Verify the other selected algorithm still returns results

title: Backtracking limit is surfaced for large amounts
description: Verify that requesting backtracking with an amount above the supported limit shows a limit error while the request can still include other algorithms.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/solve with valid coins, an amount greater than 60, the backtracking algorithm, and another supported algorithm requested
Verify the response shows a backtracking limit error
Verify the other requested algorithm still returns a result

title: Handle zero, duplicate, or unsorted coin input
description: A user can submit edge-case coin lists such as zero, duplicates, or unsorted values and see either a valid solve result or clear validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the coin denominations field with an edge-case comma-separated list
Fill in the target amount field with a valid amount
Select the greedy algorithm
Submit the form
Verify either a solve result or a validation message is shown
Verify the page responds without showing unrelated output
